headline: Teradyne to Announce First Quarter 2026 Results
summary: NORTH READING, Mass., April 14, 2026--Teradyne, Inc. (NASDAQ: TER) will release financial results for the first quarter 2026 on Tuesday, April 28, 2026 at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time (ET) or later.

headline: Chip Stocks Are on Pace for Their Longest Win Streak Since 2017
summary: Here’s a stat that might knock your socks off: The PHLX Semiconductor index is on track for its longest winning streak in nearly a decade. The SOX, as the index is called on Wall Street, has risen nine days in a row.

headline: Is Teradyne (TER) a Buy as Wall Street Analysts Look Optimistic?
summary: Based on the average brokerage recommendation (ABR), Teradyne (TER) should be added to one's portfolio. Wall Street analysts' overly optimistic recommendations cast doubt on the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric. So, is the stock worth buying?
